rulings.Case Title: LLOYD KENDRICK et al VS. BORGWARNER, INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Production Of Decedents Pathology Materials And To Request 60-Day Continuance Of Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Ford Motor Company¿s motion to compel plaintiff¿s production of decedent¿s pathology materials and to request 60-day continuance of trial date is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT NELSON et al VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One From Defendant Georgia Pacific, Llc., And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further responses to plaintiffs¿ requests for production, inspection and copying of documents and tangible things, set one, from defendant Georgia Pacific LLC, and request for sanctions is continued to July 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per the stipulated order. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs' Interrogatories From Defendant Bae Systems San Diego Ship Repair, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiff¿s interrogatories from defendant BAE Systems San Diego Ship Repair, Inc. is denied. None of the unidentified ¿plaintiffs¿ on whose behalf the motion was filed have any claims against defendant and thus they lack any basis for the relief they seek. All requests for sanctions are denied. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs¿ Interrogatories From Defendant Todd Shipyards Corporation
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the annual update to responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiffs¿ interrogatories from defendant Todd Shipyards Corp. is granted. Verified responses must be filed within 15 days of service of a written order. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied. Defendant¿s conduct did not lack substantial justification. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs' Interrogatories From Defendant The H.B. Smith Company, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiffs¿ interrogatories from defendant The H.B. Smith Co., Inc. is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs are awarded sanctions in the amount of $540. = (220/HEK)
